source_jobs.title: Financial Controller & Accounting Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!




THE ROLE

Bitstack is hiring a Financial Controller & Accounting Manager to join its finance team at a defining moment for the company. Bitstack is moving from a single-product offering to a multi-product platform, expanding its commercial footprint across European markets through the French entity, and enhancing the regulatory licences that underpin the business. The finance function sits at the centre of that evolution.

The Financial Controller & Accounting Manager will be central to preparing the company for its first external audit (on 2026 numbers, conducted in 2027) and for the Series B raise (late 2026 / Q1 2027). The role will own French statutory accounting, lead the relationships with the company's external accounting firm and tax advisor, design and implement revenue recognition for the new subscription and card interchange streams, and build the accounting, controls, and tax foundations on which the next stage of growth will be built.

This is a hands-on, autonomous role with direct exposure to the Chief Financial Officer, the leadership team, and the co-founders. The successful candidate will make and own consequential decisions from the outset.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 - Lead French statutory accounting and own monthly and annual closes, transitioning the company from an annual to a monthly close cadence.

 - Manage the relationship with the external accounting firm and, from 2027, the appointed statutory auditor.

 - Lead the company's tax compliance across direct and indirect taxes — corporate income tax, VAT (including reverse-charge on non-EU services), and other applicable taxes — in close coordination with our specialist tax advisor.

 - Design and own the company's accounting policies, including revenue recognition for subscription and card interchange revenue streams, accruals, intercompany transactions, FX treatment, and other technical positions as they emerge.

 - Build and own the bad debt provisioning and collections framework for the new subscription business, in coordination with Product, Engineering, and Customer Service.

 - Build and maintain reconciliation workflows between Cryptio (crypto sub-ledger), the subscription billing platform, the Banking-as-a-Service provider, and Pennylane (core accounting platform).

 - Lead audit readiness preparation, including documentation, internal controls design, and audit trail integrity across the company's accounting systems.

 - Drive automation and AI adoption across the finance function — building workflows, leveraging AI for analysis and reporting, and using data and tooling as a core source of leverage.

 - Contribute to the broader finance systems roadmap, including the selection and implementation of close-management software and finance productivity tools.

 - Partner with the Data Lead to ensure finance data needs are met in the company's data warehouse.




TECH STACK

 - Core accounting: Pennylane

 - Crypto sub-ledger: Cryptio

 - Treasury: Agicap

 - Procurement / SaaS contracts: Vertice

 - Close management: Numeric, FloQast, or equivalent (to be selected and implemented)

 - Analyti

source_jobs.title: Head of Risk & Compliance
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!




THE ROLE

Bitstack is hiring a Head of Risk & Compliance to lead its risk and compliance function at a defining moment for the company. Bitstack is moving from a single-product offering to a multi-product platform, expanding across European markets, and transitioning from PSAN to PSCA (MiCA) registration. The compliance function sits at the centre of that evolution.

The Head of Risk & Compliance will own Bitstack's AML-CFT framework, regulatory positioning, and compliance operations end-to-end. This is a strategic and hands-on role with direct exposure to the co-founders and leadership team, and significant scope to shape how the function scales.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING


REGULATORY & GOVERNANCE LEADERSHIP

 - Lead Bitstack's regulatory compliance strategy across MiCA/CASP, payments, and EMI activities.

 - Build, manage, and continuously improve scalable governance, escalation, and internal control frameworks across entities and products.

 - Primary point of contact with the AMF and ACPR, ensuring timely response to all regulatory obligations and requests, while securing, maintaining, and scaling Bitstack's regulatory licences across EU markets.

 - Oversee regulatory audits, inspections, independent controls, and remediation plans.

 - Support and monitor regulatory developments across MiCA, AML/CFT, PSD2, EMI, payments, stablecoins, and digital assets, and translate them into operational actions.

 - Act as the primary TRACFIN correspondent and declarant, taking full ownership of suspicious activity reporting, enhanced due diligence processes, sanctions governance, high-risk customer management frameworks, and all related regulatory reporting obligations.


RISK & COMPLIANCE OPERATIONS

 - Manage all operational AML and fraud compliance frameworks ( including KYC/KYB, EDD, PEP, transaction monitoring, sanctions screening, fraud escalation, adverse media reviews)

 - Ensure compliance operations scale effectively as Bitstack expands across products and markets.

 - Drive operational excellence across compliance workflows, tooling, SLAs, and remediation processes.

 - Build dashboards, KPIs/KRIs, reporting, and governance processes to improve visibility and control.

 - Strengthen Bitstack's internal control framework and operational risk management capabilities.

 - Oversee third-party compliance providers, outsourced controls, and operational risk related to external partners and regulated service providers.


PRODUCT & BUSINESS PARTNERSHIP

 - Work closely with Product, Engineering, Design, Operations, and Customer Care to embed compliance into product development from day one.

 - Translate complex regulatory requirements into pragmatic product and operational decisions.

 - Act as a business partner to leadership teams while maintaining strong regulatory rigor.

 - Support the launch of new products, markets, partnerships, and regulated activities.


LEADERSHIP & TEAM BUILDING

 - Scale and develop the Risk & Compliance organization as Bitstack grows.

 - Recruit, mentor, and structure high-performing compliance, risk, and internal control teams.

 - Build a cult

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!


THE ROLE

The Product team at Bitstack is responsible for turning user insights, business goals, and technical possibilities into products people love and rely on. Working in cross-functional squads, product decisions are made collaboratively by PMs, designers, and engineers.

As a Product Manager, you will work inside a dedicated product squad focused on delivering impactful products from opportunity to launch.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

As a Product Manager at Bitstack, you will:

 - Co-lead end-to-end product development with your squad - from opportunity sizing and planning, through build, to launch.

 - Frame the business case: assess P&L impact, benchmarks, and compliance fit to help decide whether to go/no-go.

 - Own product marketing: craft positioning, messaging, and launch narratives, and ensure knowledge transfer across internal teams.

 - Partner closely with designers and engineers: work side by side to clarify outcomes, sequence scope, coordinate vendors, and remove blockers so everyone can do their best work.

 - Make decisions evidence-based: use research, data, and direct user feedback to ensure we're solving the right problems with the right solutions.

 - Translate insights into action: align with the team on problems to solve, define success metrics together, and provide specs or context where useful.

 - Own outcomes with your squad: define success metrics and events before build, put in place lightweight processes and tools for post-launch tracking, and drive iteration until measurable impact is achieved (scale, adjust, or kill).

 - Guide scope and QA: plan and ensure launches meet quality and compliance standards.

 - Measure, learn, and iterate: analyze adoption, retention, and feedback post-launch to guide future improvements.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We care more about impact than titles. The ideal candidate:

 - Has demonstrated excellence in product roles, with a track record of shipping features and driving measurable outcomes across the full product lifecycle.

 - Thinks in problems, not solutions - you start from user needs and business goals, not feature lists.

 - Has strong product and analytical judgment - you can go from messy data to a clear hypothesis.

 - Is comfortable defining metrics, structuring specs, and reasoning from qualitative and quantitative signals.

 - Thrives in fast-paced startup environments where ownership and accountability matter more than hierarchy.

 - Can balance speed with product quality and regulatory constraints.

 - Communicates clearly and aligns teams around outcomes, not outputs.

Experience in consumer fintech, crypto, marketplaces, or high-scale consumer apps is a strong plus.




PERKS & BENEFITS

🌎 Work from our office in Paris (Bourse) or Remote

🕑 Flexible working hours

👩‍⚕️ One of the best health insurance plans with 100% employer contributions

🏄 Monthly team activities and annual offsites

🍉 Swile meal vouchers

🤑 Competitive salary based on experience & Bitstack stock options

 

Please note - we currently can only hire people who are based in the EU with working rights. If you need sponsor

source_jobs.title: Mobile Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!




THE ROLE

Bitstack's engineering team builds the technology that powers our mission - a product that people actually use, trust, and care about. We work in small, cross-functional squads with real ownership and short feedback loops. As a mobile engineer, you'll own features end to end, work directly with designers and product, and ship things that land in the hands of hundreds of thousands of users.

We work across four squads - Banking, Savings, Growth, and Platform. You'll be placed into a squad based on your strengths and where you can have the most impact.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 - Own features from scoping through to production - you'll shape the approach, make the technical decisions, and see it through

 - Work closely with engineers, designers, and product in a fast-moving, cross-functional squad

 - Build a well-tested, performant app that communicates with Bitstack's backend infrastructure

 - Bring high-quality, accessible user interfaces to life with an emphasis on polish and user experience

 - Ship reliable, scalable products in a production environment and take accountability for what you build

 - Write tests - unit, integration, and otherwise - and care about code quality throughout

 - Work in a highly compliant financial environment where security and reliability are non-negotiable

 - Contribute to the broader tech and open source communities




TECH STACK

 - Backend: Go, Python

 - Frontend: Flutter, Dart, TypeScript, JavaScript

 - Databases: SQL




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Native iOS or Android experience is a must - when Flutter hits its limits, you know how to go deeper into the native layer

 - A product-first mindset - you care about the impact your work has on users, not just how the code is written

 - Strong ownership instincts - you scope, build, and support your work end to end without waiting to be told what to do

 - Experience working in small, cross-functional teams where you've had to make real decisions

 - Understanding of mobile application lifecycles, software development practices, and integration testing

 - Solid Git workflow knowledge and comfort with automation

 - Clear, direct communication - you can talk through your thinking, take feedback, and push back when you need to

 - Fluent English - French is a bonus




INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. Introductory Call (30 min)
    An initial conversation with our recruiter to get to know you better and share more details about the role, the team, and how we work at Bitstack

 2. Engineer Call (30 min)
    
    A chat with one of our engineers to go a bit deeper into your experience at a high level, find out a bit more about how you think about mobile apps, as well as a basic question around architecture. You will also have a chance to find out more about our engineering culture.

 3. System Design (60 min)
    A discussion focused on how you approach problem-solving, communicate your ideas, and prioritise decisions. This helps us assess your technical depth and ability to design scalable systems

 4. Take Home Task & Task Review Call (60 min)
    You’ll receive a practical task t

source_jobs.title: Internal Control Officer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!


THE ROLE

Bitstack is a licensed CASP under MiCA and an AMF-registered entity. Our compliance framework isn't a checkbox, it's a competitive advantage.

As we grow, we need someone to make sure our AML/CFT controls are airtight, evolving, and battle-tested.

You'll work directly with our Head of Risk & Compliance to run our 2nd-level control program and be the person who connects the dots between risk, operations, and regulators.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Running our 2nd-level control program
   Design and execute permanent controls that verify our AML/CFT framework is working in practice. You'll oversee how 1st-line teams carry out their own controls, document findings, identify gaps, and push remediation plans all the way to closure.

 - Keeping our risk mapping sharp
   Work alongside the Head of Risk & Compliance to maintain and update our AML/CFT risk mapping annually : covering clients, products, distribution channels and geographies. You'll also map risks tied to our key partners and vendors, including Xpollens and our custodians.

 - Owning regulatory deliverables
   Be the person who produces solid, well-documented inputs for AMF, ACPR and TRACFIN. You'll contribute to internal risk committees, prepare KPIs and KRIs, and support reporting to senior leadership and the supervisory body.

 - Collaborating across the business
   Partner closely with operational teams (LoD1) to strengthen controls at every level. Compliance here isn't siloed, you'll be a real cross-functional player.

 - Building compliance culture
   Co-develop AML/CFT training modules, run sessions for the whole company, and help new joiners get up to speed on our internal control framework from day one.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 4-6 years of experience in AML/CFT compliance, internal control, or risk ideally within a bank, EMI, crypto/fintech, or regulatory body ;

 - Solid hands-on knowledge of the AML/CFT framework: risk mapping, permanent controls, suspicious transaction reporting ;

 - Familiarity with the French regulatory landscape (AMF, ACPR, TRACFIN) and MiCA is a strong plus ;

 - Experience operating in a 2nd line of defense role, with exposure to LoD1 oversight ;

 - You don't just flag problems : you follow through until they're fixed ;

 - Detail-oriented without losing sight of the bigger risk picture ;

 - Comfortable in a fast-moving environment where processes are still being built ;

 - Fluent in French and English.




PROCESS

 - Introductory Call
   An initial conversation with Mélanie from our People Team to get to know you better and share more details about the role, the team, and how we work at Bitstack.

 - Team Interview
   A discussion with the team to explore in more depth your experience with collaboration, your ways of working, and how you might fit within the team.

 - Hiring Manager Interview
   A discussion with our Head of Risk & Compliance to dive deeper into your experience, expectations, and how you approach your role and impact.

 - Founder Interview
   A final discussion with our CEO to align on vision and expectations.



Perks & Benefits

🌎 Work from

source_jobs.title: Founder Associate Intern
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!


THE ROLE

We are seeking a dynamic and versatile Founder's Associate to work directly with the company's CEO, providing critical support across a variety of projects and functions. As a Founder's Associate, you'll help optimize the CEO's time and resources, working on tasks that span across operations, product development, fundraising, marketing, and strategy.

This is a hands-on CEO Right-Hand role where you'll blend ownership with execution. You'll work closely with the CEO to support our growing company, strengthen our processes, and make Bitstack a stellar company. This is an exciting opportunity to gain hands-on experience and impact across all aspects of a fast-growing startup.




This is a 6-month full-time internship starting in September 2026, based in Paris with a flexible hybrid setup. You’ll work closely with the founders and leadership team, so regular time in the office will be important for collaboration and learning. The internship will be carried out under a French convention de stage.







WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

 - Act as a strategic partner to the CEO to drive key cross-functional initiatives and ensure organizational alignment.

 - Prepare and manage recurring investor and board reports (financial metrics, KPIs, product updates, and hiring progress).

 - Maintain and update the investor CRM; ensure timely communication and follow-ups.

 - Support preparation and coordination of board meetings, investor updates, and leadership offsites.

 - Lead or support cross-departmental projects that enhance growth, operations, or internal processes.

 - Collaborate with Finance and Operations on performance tracking, budgeting, and headcount reporting.

 - Build and optimize internal systems for OKR tracking and operational visibility.

 - Provide data-driven insights to support decision-making and strategic planning.

 - Partner with Marketing and Product teams to help execute growth and user engagement initiatives.

 - Manage project timelines, documentation, and follow-ups for strategic and operational priorities.


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have 6 months to 1 year of relevant experience in VC / fintech startup ;

 - You are hands-on and have a “get things done” attitude ;

 - You have excellent communication and stakeholder management skills and can act as the bridge between different departments ;

 - Hands-on, proactive, and comfortable switching between finance, product, and admin topics ;

 - You are highly organized with exceptional project management skills to keep investor outreach and other high-priority activities on track ;

 - You like to take initiative and find new creative solutions to problems with expertise in balancing and articulating trade-offs ;

 - You are humble, open to challenge, and like to help others grow with the ability to effectively influence and communicate cross-functionally ;

 - You’re always looking to learn and are excited about talking to users, partners, and everything around the company ;

 - Excellent communication in French and English.


BONUS POINTS :

 - You are passionate about Bitcoin & personal finance.

 -

source_jobs.title: Brand Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT BITSTACK

It all started with an idea in 2021. Initially built to democratize Bitcoin in France, Bitstack has gone from a simple product that invests spare change in bitcoin, to a crypto-native bank bringing a better way to save, spend, and grow money to our 300K+ users. We want to rebuild finance from the ground up to empower people to achieve financial freedom by participating in a more open and inclusive financial system. We’re a small, ambitious team of operators. We believe in moving fast, sweating the details, and creating products people truly love. At Bitstack, you’ll have the opportunity to shape not just our products, but the culture and practices of our entire organization. Bitstack is backed by YC, leading VCs like 13books Capital, Stillmark, Serena, and many more. We are building a product our users love and we are just getting started!




THE ROLE

You'll be our first brand hire — and it's a special moment to join. We've just crafted a brand new identity with a top creative agency, and we need someone to own it, evolve it, and make it live everywhere: campaigns, social, web, motion, and in-product illustration.

This is a hands-on role for a designer with exceptional taste, strong brand instincts, and the ability to think in systems — someone who can make beautiful work, but also define how that work scales. One day you're building templates that let the whole team ship on-brand work independently; the next you're animating a launch video or illustrating a new feature.

This is not a role for someone who wants to direct from the sidelines. We're looking for a maker — someone who still loves the details: the typography, the grid, the motion, the final 5% that makes something feel excellent.

We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. If you're a designer who obsesses over craft, storytelling, and visual consistency at scale, you'll thrive here.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

In one sentence: Shape how the world sees and experiences Bitstack.

 - Own and evolve Bitstack's visual identity system across all brand touchpoints

 - Create thoughtful, polished, visually compelling brand design across web, campaign, social, experiential, interactive, and digital channels.

 - Work with marketing to bring campaigns to life visually, create assets for campaigns, social media, and branding initiatives

 - Establish brand guidelines and systems that ensure consistency as we scale rapidly

 - Use AI and emerging creative tools as part of your process — not as a shortcut, but as a way to explore faster, push further, and make stronger work

 - Be scrappy and hands-on with whatever the brand needs, from a Instagram carousel to landing page

 - Help set and raise the bar for visual quality brand work, defining what great looks like
   
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Several years of experience as a visual, brand, and/or motion designer

 - A portfolio of shipped brand assets - campaign visuals, social graphics, presentation decks, event materials, and marketing collateral

 - Excellent visual, UI, motion and interactive design skills

 - Eye for good design, attention to detail, and a genuine love for the craft

 - Proven ability to maintain brand consistency while delivering high volumes of work across multiple channels

 - Experience creating scalable brand systems, templates, and guidelines that enable teams to execute independently

 - Ability to work autonomously and manage multiple concurrent projects from brief to delivery
   
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - 3D modelling and animation skills (Cinema 4D, Blender, Spline)

 - Experience with no-code web tools (Webflow, Framer)

 - Experience localising assets for different markets



Perks & Benefits

🌎 Work from our office in Paris (Bourse) or Remote

🕑 Flexible working hours

👩‍⚕️ One of the best health insurance plans with 100% employer contributions

🏄 Monthly team activities and annual offsites

🍉 Swile meal vouchers

🤑 Competitive salary based on experi

notes: Crypto-native bank with a small team, moving fast and creating products people love.
